Durga Prasad, President, Nominee of The Institute of Cost and Works Accountants of India Chairperson, [Nominated under clause (a) of sub-section(2) of section 21GA] Member, [nominated under clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 210A] (3) Shri R. Sridharan, President, Nominee of The Institute of Company Secretaries of India Member, [nominated under clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 2I0A] -- 2 of 3 -- [*TPT U-TsPZ 3 (ii)3 «TR?T ^T TRTT^T : 34<MI«4KU I (4) CA. K. Raghu, President, Nominee of The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India Member, [nominated under clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 210A] (5) Joint Secretary, Ministry of Corporate Affairs (6) Shri Sudarshan Sen, Chief General Manager-in-Charge, Nominee of Reserve Bank of India Member, [Nominated under clause (c) of sub-section (2) ofsection 2I0A] Member, [nominated under clause (d) of sub-section (2) ofsection 2I0A] (7) Shri P Sesh Kumar, Director General (Commercial), Nominee of Comptroller and Auditor General of India (8) Prof. I.M Pandey, Ex-faculty, Indian Institute of Management, AnincdaLiad (9) Joint Sccietai'y, Tax P"Iicv Lav/T! Nominee of Central Board of Direct Taxes. (10) Shri Rostow Ravanan, Nominee of Confederation of Indian Industry. (11) Shri Adesh Gupta, Nominee of Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry Member, [nominated under clause (e) of sub-section (2) ofsection 2IOA] Member, [nominated under clause (f) of sub= section (2) ofsection 2 IOA] I T J V l l l L l i . 1 . , [nominated under clause (&} of sub- section (2) of section 2I0A] Member, [nominated under clause (h) of sub-section (2) of section 21OA] Member, [nominated under clause (h) of sub-section (2) of section 210A] (12) Dr. Ashok Haldia, Nominee of Associated Chambers of Commerce and Industry of India (13) Shri S. Ravindran, Executive Director, Nominee of Securities Exchange Board of India. Member, [Nominated under clause (h) of sub-section (2) ofsection 2I0A]. Member, [nominated under clause (i) of sub-section (2) of section 2 IOA] 2. The Chairperson and members shall hold office for a period of one year from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette or till the constitution of National Financial Reporting Authority under Section 132 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013) whichever is earlier. 3. This notification shall come into force on!8fh September, 2014. [F.No. 1/5/2001 -CL. V (Part V)] AMARDEEP SINGH BHATIA, Jt. Secy.
